---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Appriyo
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-discussion
assignees: Shahjalal-Mahmud
---

## 🚀 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like in clear, concise terms.

## 🗺️ Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Expected Outcome

What will this feature improve for users or the company?

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples, or references here.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria (if known)

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## 👤 Assignee

@Shahjalal-Mahmud will review and prioritize.

---

_Note: Feature requests are evaluated based on business value and alignment with Appriyo's vision._
